title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies:
Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies!
